items.name: Steam Momo (10 pcs)
items.description: Served with 2 dipping sauces.

items.name: Jhol Momo (10 pcs)
items.description: Steamed dumplings served with peanuts, tomatoes and sesame herbs based cold soup. A combination of hot steamed momo & cold soup.

items.name: Chilli Momo (C-Momo) (10 pcs)
items.description: Momo pan-fried with capsicum, onion, tomatoes wedges and coriander topping. Normally served sweet and spicy.

items.name: Mixed Entree
items.description: 1 chicken pan fried momo (6 pcs), 2 popular spring roll (veg), 5 chicken chilli, 4 pieces skewered chicken with chips, lollypop sauce.

items.name: Special Platter for 2-3 Person
items.description: B.C.F.C half XL & chips, 1 chicken pan fried momo (10 pcs), popular spring roll (veg), chicken chilli lollypop, dipping sauce, 3-side fillet.

items.name: Value Pack
items.description: 1 Everest chicken curry with rice, 1 Nepalese-style sekuwa chicken with rice, 3 chicken pan fried momo (6 pcs), popular spring roll (veg), garlic chicken, dipping sauce.

items.name: Momo (Dumplings) 6 pcs
items.description: Six pieces of momos steamed or deep-fried, served with mild & spicy sauce.

items.name: Popular Spring Roll (Veg)
items.description: Filling vegetables & herbs, serve 3 roll with dipping sauce.

items.name: Handmade Noodle Spring Roll
items.description: Special filling chow mein noodles, handmade crispy, serve 2 roll / 4 pieces with dipping sauce.

items.name: Chicken Skewer with Chips
items.description: Marinated chicken served 2 skewers with a bowl of chips and dipping sauce.

items.name: MT Everest Soup
items.description: Momo dumplings, diced tomatoes, onion, spring onion, and coriander topping.

items.name: Laphing
items.description: A demanding & popular dish from Nepal, India and Bhutan. Filling with garlic, peanuts, dry noodles, shrewan paper. Served dry or jhol with coriander topping.

items.name: Nepali Style Sausages
items.description: Sausage skewers seasoned with Nepalese herbs, served with special sausage sauce.

items.name: Wai Wai Sadeko
items.description: Dry noodles and boiled potatoes mixed with lemon, diced tomatoes, onion, and coriander. Spicy or non spicy.

items.name: Chana Chatpate
items.description: Puff rice, dry noodles, and boiled potatoes mixed with lemon, diced tomatoes, onion, and coriander. Spicy or non spicy.

items.name: Chips Chilli
items.description: Bowl of chips, onion, capsicum, tomatoes wedges & coriander, or seasonal vegetables. Spicy sauce.

items.name: Chowmein (Wok Fry Noodles)
items.description: Noodles, onion, cabbage, carrots or seasonal vegetables, served with hot & mild momo sauce. Large portion.

items.name: Authentic Nepali Fried Rice
items.description: Rice, onion, cabbage, carrots or seasonal vegetables, served with hot & mild momo sauce. Large portion.

items.name: Himalayan Thukpa (Noodle Soup)
items.description: Noodles, momos, onion, cabbage, carrots or seasonal vegetables. Large portion.

items.name: Everest Curry with Rice
items.description: Marinated chicken or pork, onion, capsicum, tomatoes, coriander or seasonal vegetables, served with a bowl of rice.

items.name: Nepal Style Stay Chicken (Sekuwa) with Rice
items.description: Half kg pre-marinated chicken Maryland pieces (sekuwa), tomatoes wedges, capsicum, onion, pak choy, served with bowl of rice.

items.name: Chilli Chicken with Rice or Roti
items.description: Marinated chicken, onion, capsicum, tomatoes wedges & coriander, or seasonal vegetables, served with a bowl of rice.

items.name: Wok Fried Alu with Roti
items.description: Potatoes wok-fried with onion, capsicum, tomatoes, or seasonal vegetables. Served with paratha bread.

items.name: B.C.F.C - Half KG & Chips
items.description: Half kg boneless crunchy chicken Maryland pieces, a bowl of chips, dipping sauce.

items.name: C.F.C.W & Chips (Crunchy Fried Chicken Wings)
items.description: Crunchy deep-fried chicken middle wings and mini drumstick, a bowl of chips & dipping sauce.

items.name: Pork Belly with Rice
items.description: Pork belly, capsicum, onion and tomato wedges or seasonal vegetables served with rice.

items.name: Nepalese Chicken Chopsuey
items.description: Chicken, crunchy deep-fried noodles, sliced cabbage, carrots, onion, spring onion, garlic, and 2 eggs on the top.

items.name: Wok Fried Sukuti with Rice or Puff Rice
items.description: Dry crunchy meats, capsicum, onion, tomato wedges or seasonal vegetables and Nepalese herbs served with hot & mild momo sauce.

items.name: Special Keema Noodles / Nepali Spaghetti
items.description: Fried chicken minced, boiled noodles, capsicum, garlic, onion, pak choy, soy sauce, peanut, sesame seeds, chili paste, vinegar and Szechuan pepper.
